# Test Fixtures

These binary files are not distributed with the repository. To run the test
suite, place the following files from a Shovel Knight installation:

```
battle/characterAttributes.stb   ← Shovel Knight/data/battle/
battle/characterEntry.stb        ← Shovel Knight/data/battle/
dialogue/speakers.stb            ← Shovel Knight/data/dialogue/
dialogue/passerby.stb            ← Shovel Knight/data/dialogue/
menus/credits.stb                ← Shovel Knight/data/menus/
loctext/dialogue.stm             ← loctext/loctext_global/loctext/
loctext/menus.stm                ← loctext/loctext_global/loctext/
```
